begin
  data = JSON.parse(raw)
rescue JSON::ParserError => error
  warn error.message
end

case status
when 200 then :ok
when 404 then :missing
else :error
end

if score >= 90
  grade = "A"
elsif score >= 80
  grade = "B"
end

loop do
  break if queue.empty?
  process(queue.shift)
end

total = prices.reduce(0) do |acc, price|
  acc + price
end

begin
  data = fetch(url)
ensure
  cleanup
end

label = case score
when 90.. then "A"
when 80...90 then "B"
else "C"
end
